titleStmt.title: SII 31.27: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 27. (A.R. No. B 293 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fourth pillar inside the mukha maṇḍapa of Viṭṭhalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1165, Śōbhakṛit (wrong for Śōbhana) Āśvīyuja śu. 12. Kanyā saṁkrānti, Saturday corresponding to September 26, 1243 A.D.

Slightly damaged. It records the gift of 150 cows and 110 sheep to maintain eight perpetual lamps in the temple of the god Bhōgīśvaradēva at Bhaṭṭiprōlu, for the merit of his guru by Paripūrṇaśiva-mahāmuni. The gifted cows and sheep were stated to have been entrusted to certain bōyas (names mentioned) with the stipulation that they should supply one māna of ghee every day to the temple. Paripūrṇa Śiva mahāmuni is described as the son of Viśvēśvara-śivamahāmuni who was the disciple of Dharmmaśiva mahāmuni and the teacher (guru) of Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī śubha śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1165 śōbhakṛtsaṁ
vatsara Āśvīyuja śuddha
12 śanivāramunāṁḍu kanyā
saṁkrātti nimittamuna
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatīya gaṇapatidēva ma
hārājulu gurulu dha¨rmma
śiva mahāmunula śiṣya
lu viśvēśvaraśivamahāmunu
la koḍu paripūrṇa śivamahā

munulu tamagurulaku dha
¨rmmu pugānu śrīmadbhaṭṭiprōli
bhōgīsva(śva)ra śrīmanmahādēvu
nikiṁ beṭṭi Akhaṁḍava¨rtti dī
pamulu 8 vīnikiṁ ṭeṭṭina dhē
nuvulu 150 goṟiyalu
110 vīniṁ jēkoni Amire
bōyani koḍku prōleyu
ṁḍunu gannabōyuṁḍu pi
llebōyuṁḍu bōvvanabōyu
ṁḍu koṁḍḍamruccuṁbrōle bōyu
ṁḍu Itani tamuṁḍu paḷlabō
yuṁḍu
kuṁḍana bōyuṁḍu

bōyuḍu Iddaṟu
kani kāṁ bōyuṁḍu
prolabōyuṁḍu Iṁta
vaṭṭuku nipa
nityamāneṁḍu nēti paḍi
nāḍu tama pu
trānu gā naḍupa
ṁgala vāru .
Digital edition of SII 31.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
